sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
t = last_transition
before_seg = t.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = t.after_frame.segmentation

def get_nodes(seg):
    nodes = []
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['boundary'][0][0] == 63:
            continue
        nodes.append((n['color'], n['pixels'], tuple(sorted(map(tuple, n['boundary'])))))
    return sorted(nodes)

before = set(get_nodes(before_seg))
after = set(get_nodes(after_seg))

removed = before - after
added = after - before

if removed or added:
    print("CHANGES DETECTED:")
    for r in removed:
        print(f"  REMOVED: {r}")
    for a in added:
        print(f"  ADDED: {a}")
else:
    print("No gameplay changes (only timer)")

# Let me also check the yellow seed indicator area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n--- Yellow seed indicator area ---")
for i in range(26, 34):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][7:14]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
